component.name: MNELAB
component.summary: A graphical user interface for MNE-Python

description.p: MNELAB is a graphical user interface (GUI) for MNE-Python, a comprehensive open-source Python package for processing and visualising EEG, MEG, and other electrophysiological data.

ul.li: Open and save EEG/MEG recordings in many formats (EDF, BDF, BrainVision, FIF, XDF, MATLAB, NumPy, …)
Filtering, re-referencing, epoch extraction, and artifact rejection
Independent Component Analysis (ICA) with ICLabel automatic classification
Power spectral density (PSD) plots and evoked response visualisation
Reproducible workflow via a Python history log

screenshot.caption: MNELAB main window with an EEG recording loaded

description.p: Fix PyBVRF import in standalone releases.
Added automatic epoch artifact detection dialog and MNE log viewer in the history dialog. Fixed dependency detection in standalone versions.
Added support for BVRF import via PyBVRF. Fixed macOS app icon for light/dark mode.
Added annotations-from-events dialog, ICLabel ICA classification, history export to Python file, and channel stats CSV export.
Fixed ICA calculation and command-line file opening in standalone releases.
